title: SQL query for Total Sales
scenario: Write a SQL query that calculates the total sales for a given set of orders. The query should be easy to understand and follow best practices. The target output should be a string representation of the SQL query. The output should be under 100 characters and use active voice.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the SQL query is syntactically valid.
Check if the query meets the length and voice constraints.
Check if the query is easy to understand and follows best practices.
